TestCaseInfo.TestDescription: Verify there should be error message in message pane for invalid (Peripheral) devices.network.interfaces.address key-not a valid IPV4.
TestCaseInfo.TestCaseHeader: Verify there should be error message in message pane for invalid (Peripheral) devices.network.interfaces.address key-not a valid IPV4.

VerifyMessage.MessageText: TLP Pro 1230WTG - network.interfaces.address: Invalid - Must be a valid IPv4, hostname or FQDN value e.g. "address": "192.168.1.100"
TLP Pro 300M - network.interfaces.address: Invalid - Must be a valid IPv4, hostname or FQDN value e.g. "address": "192.168.1.100"
TLI Pro 201 - network.interfaces.address: Invalid - Must be a valid IPv4, hostname or FQDN value e.g. "address": "192.168.1.100"
